content.full_text:
June 17, 1991

Kirk Alan Pessner
Paralegal Administrator, Political Reports Unit
Nielsen, Merksamer, Hodgson, Parrinello & Mueller
591 Redwood Highway, #4000
Mill Valley, CA 94941

Re: Your Request For Advice
Our File No A-91-271

Dear Mr. Pessner:

This is in response to your letter requesting confirmation of telephone advice provided to you on behalf of Daniel P. Levin regarding his responsibilities under the campaign disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act.1/

Your letter dated May 10, 1991, accurately summarizes the advice provided to you. The expenditures made by Mr. Levin in connection with obtaining legal assistance, as described in our telephone conversation and in your letter, do not meet the definition of "independent expenditures" (Section 82031) and, because they were not made to or at the behest of a candidate or committee, they do not meet the definition of "contributions" (Section 82015). Therefore, those expenditures are not required to be disclosed under the Act.

If you have any questions about this letter, please call me at (916) 322-5662.

Sincerely,

Scott H. Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

By: Jeanne Pritchard
Division Chief
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division

1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.
